tEn: Visual Autoregressive Modeling: Scalable Image Generation via Next-Scale Prediction
tZh: 视觉自回归建模：通过下一尺度预测实现可扩展的图像生成
sEn: VAR redefines autoregressive image generation as coarse-to-fine next-scale prediction, achieving state-of-the-art results on ImageNet with 20x faster inference than diffusion transformers.
sZh: VAR将自回归图像生成重新定义为从粗到细的下一尺度预测，在ImageNet上取得最优结果，推理速度比扩散变换器快20倍。
absEn: We present Visual AutoRegressive modeling (VAR), a new generation paradigm that redefines the autoregressive learning on images as coarse-to-fine "next-scale prediction" or "next-resolution prediction", diverging from the standard raster-scan "next-token prediction". This simple, intuitive methodology allows autoregressive (AR) transformers to learn visual distributions fast and generalize well: VAR, for the first time, makes GPT-like AR models surpass diffusion transformers in image generation. On ImageNet 256x256 benchmark, VAR significantly improve AR baseline by improving Frechet inception distance (FID) from 18.65 to 1.73, inception score (IS) from 80.4 to 350.2, with around 20x faster inference speed. It is also empirically verified that VAR outperforms the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) in multiple dimensions including image quality, inference speed, data efficiency, and scalability. Scaling up VAR models exhibits clear power-law scaling laws similar to those observed in LLMs, with linear correlation coefficients near -0.998 as solid evidence. VAR further showcases zero-shot generalization ability in downstream tasks including image in-painting, out-painting, and editing. These results suggest VAR has initially emulated the two important properties of LLMs: Scaling Laws and zero-shot task generalization. We have released all models and codes to promote the exploration of AR/VAR models for visual generation and unified learning.
absZh: 我们提出了视觉自回归建模（VAR），这是一种新的生成范式，它将图像上的自回归学习重新定义为从粗到细的“下一尺度预测”或“下一分辨率预测”，与标准的逐光栅扫描“下一标记预测”不同。这种简单直观的方法使得自回归变换器能够快速学习视觉分布并具有良好的泛化能力：VAR首次使得类似GPT的自回归模型在图像生成上超越了扩散变换器。在ImageNet 256x256基准测试中，VAR显著改进了自回归基线，将FID从18.65降至1.73，IS从80.4提升至350.2，推理速度提升约20倍。实验还验证了VAR在图像质量、推理速度、数据效率和可扩展性等多个维度上优于扩散变换器（DiT）。扩展VAR模型展现出与LLM中观察到的类似的清晰幂律缩放定律，线性相关系数接近-0.998，这是有力的证据。VAR还在下游任务（如图像修复、外推和编辑）中展示了零样本泛化能力。这些结果表明VAR初步模拟了LLM的两个重要特性：缩放定律和零样本任务泛化。我们已发布所有模型和代码，以促进AR/VAR模型在视觉生成和统一学习中的探索。

contrib.en: Proposes Visual AutoRegressive (VAR) modeling with next-scale prediction, redefining autoregressive learning on images as coarse-to-fine generation.
contrib.zh: 提出视觉自回归（VAR）建模，采用下一尺度预测，将图像上的自回归学习重新定义为从粗到细的生成。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art image generation on ImageNet 256×256 with FID 1.73 and IS 350.2, surpassing diffusion transformers for the first time.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet 256×256上实现了最先进的图像生成，FID为1.73，IS为350.2，首次超越了扩散Transformer。

contrib.en: Demonstrates clear power-law scaling laws for VAR models, with linear correlation coefficients near -0.998, similar to LLMs.
contrib.zh: 展示了VAR模型清晰的幂律缩放定律，线性相关系数接近-0.998，类似于大语言模型。

contrib.en: Shows zero-shot generalization in downstream tasks like image in-painting, out-painting, and editing without task-specific tuning.
contrib.zh: 在下游任务如图像修复、外推和编辑中展示了零样本泛化能力，无需任务特定调优。

contrib.en: Provides 20x faster inference speed compared to standard autoregressive models, reducing computational complexity from O(n^6) to O(n^4).
contrib.zh: 与标准自回归模型相比，推理速度提升20倍，计算复杂度从O(n^6)降至O(n^4)。

contrib.en: Releases all models and code to promote exploration of AR/VAR models for visual generation and unified learning.
contrib.zh: 发布所有模型和代码，以促进AR/VAR模型在视觉生成和统一学习中的探索。

limits.en: VAR relies on a fixed multi-scale tokenization scheme; performance may vary with different tokenizer designs.
limits.zh: VAR依赖于固定的多尺度分词方案；性能可能因不同的分词器设计而异。

limits.en: The study focuses on class-conditional image generation; text-prompt generation is not yet explored.
limits.zh: 研究集中于类别条件图像生成；文本提示生成尚未探索。

limits.en: Video generation is not implemented; extension to video requires further research on 3D next-scale prediction.
limits.zh: 视频生成尚未实现；扩展到视频需要进一步研究3D下一尺度预测。

limits.en: The VQVAE tokenizer is kept unchanged from baseline; advanced tokenizers could further improve performance.
limits.zh: VQVAE分词器保持与基线相同；先进的分词器可能进一步提升性能。

limits.en: Scaling laws are validated only on ImageNet; generalization to other datasets or domains is not verified.
limits.zh: 缩放定律仅在ImageNet上验证；对其他数据集或领域的泛化性未验证。

items.en: We present Visual AutoRegressive modeling (VAR), a new generation paradigm that redefines the autoregressive learning on images as coarse-to-fine “next-scale prediction” or “next-resolution prediction”, diverging from the standard raster-scan “next-token prediction”. This simple, intuitive methodology allows autoregressive (AR) transformers to learn visual distributions fast and can generalize well: VAR, for the first time, makes GPT-style AR models surpass diffusion transformers in image generation. On ImageNet 256×\times256 benchmark, VAR significantly improve AR baseline by improving Fréchet inception distance (FID) from 18.65 to 1.80, inception score (IS) from 80.4 to 356.4, with 20×\times faster inference speed. It is also empirically verified that VAR outperforms the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) in multiple dimensions including image quality, inference speed, data efficiency, and scalability. Scaling up VAR models exhibits clear power-law scaling laws similar to those observed in LLMs, with linear correlation coefficients near −0.9980.998-0.998 as solid evidence. VAR further showcases zero-shot generalization ability in downstream tasks including image in-painting, out-painting, and editing. These results suggest VAR has initially emulated the two important properties of LLMs: Scaling Laws and zero-shot generalization. We have released all models and codes to promote the exploration of AR/VAR models for visual generation and unified learning.
items.zh: 我们提出了视觉自回归建模（VAR），这是一种新的生成范式，将图像上的自回归学习重新定义为从粗到细的“下一尺度预测”或“下一分辨率预测”，与标准的栅格扫描“下一个词预测”不同。这种简单直观的方法使得自回归（AR）Transformer能够快速学习视觉分布并具有良好的泛化能力：VAR首次使GPT风格的AR模型在图像生成上超越扩散Transformer。在ImageNet 256×256基准测试中，VAR通过将Fréchet初始距离（FID）从18.65提升到1.80，初始分数（IS）从80.4提升到356.4，推理速度提升20倍，显著改进了AR基线。实验还验证了VAR在图像质量、推理速度、数据效率和可扩展性等多个维度上优于扩散Transformer（DiT）。扩展VAR模型表现出与LLM中观察到的类似的清晰幂律缩放定律，线性相关系数接近-0.998作为有力证据。VAR进一步在下游任务（如图像修复、外推和编辑）中展示了零样本泛化能力。这些结果表明VAR初步模拟了LLM的两个重要特性：缩放定律和零样本泛化。我们已发布所有模型和代码，以促进AR/VAR模型在视觉生成和统一学习中的探索。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Generated samples from Visual AutoRegressive (VAR) transformers trained on ImageNet. We show 512×\times512 samples (top), 256×\times256 samples (middle), and zero-shot image editing results (bottom).
items.capZh: 图1：在ImageNet上训练的视觉自回归（VAR）Transformer生成的样本。我们展示了512×512样本（顶部）、256×256样本（中部）和零样本图像编辑结果（底部）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Standard autoregressive modeling (AR) vs. our proposed visual autoregressive modeling (VAR). (a) AR applied to language: sequential text token generation from left to right, word by word; (b) AR applied to images: sequential visual token generation in a raster-scan order, from left to right, top to bottom; (c) VAR for images: multi-scale token maps are autoregressively generated from coarse to fine scales (lower to higher resolutions), with parallel token generation within each scale. VAR requires a multi-scale VQVAE to work.
items.capZh: 图2：标准自回归建模（AR）与我们提出的视觉自回归建模（VAR）。(a) AR应用于语言：从左到右逐词生成顺序文本标记；(b) AR应用于图像：以栅格扫描顺序从左到右、从上到下生成顺序视觉标记；(c) VAR用于图像：从粗到细尺度（从低分辨率到高分辨率）自回归生成多尺度标记图，每个尺度内并行生成标记。VAR需要多尺度VQVAE才能工作。

items.en: The advent of GPT series [48, 49, 9, 45, 1] and other autoregressive (AR) large language models (LLMs) [13, 3, 27, 63, 64, 70, 60, 4, 61] has heralded a new epoch in the field of artificial intelligence. These models exhibit promising intelligence in generality and versatility that, despite issues like hallucinations [28], are still considered to take a solid step toward the general artificial intelligence (AGI). The crux behind these large models is a self-supervised learning strategy – predicting the next token in a sequence, a simple yet profound approach. Studies into the success of these large AR models have highlighted their scalability and generalizabilty: the former, as exemplified by scaling laws [30, 22], allows us to predict large model’s performance from smaller ones and thus guides better resource allocation, while the latter, as evidenced by zero-shot and few-shot learning [49, 9], underscores the unsupervised-trained models’ adaptability to diverse, unseen tasks. These properties reveal AR models’ potential in learning from vast unlabeled data, encapsulating the essence of “AGI”.
items.zh: GPT系列[48, 49, 9, 45, 1]和其他自回归（AR）大语言模型（LLM）[13, 3, 27, 63, 64, 70, 60, 4, 61]的出现宣告了人工智能领域的新纪元。这些模型在通用性和多功能性方面展现出有希望的智能，尽管存在幻觉等问题[28]，但仍被认为向通用人工智能（AGI）迈出了坚实的一步。这些大型模型背后的关键是自监督学习策略——预测序列中的下一个词，这是一种简单而深刻的方法。对这些大型AR模型成功的研究强调了它们的可扩展性和泛化能力：前者，如缩放定律[30, 22]所示，使我们能够从小模型预测大模型的性能，从而指导更好的资源分配；后者，如零样本和少样本学习[49, 9]所证明，强调了无监督训练模型对多样、未见任务的适应性。这些特性揭示了AR模型从大量未标记数据中学习的潜力，概括了“AGI”的本质。

items.en: In parallel, the field of computer vision has been striving to develop large autoregressive or world models [42, 68, 5], aiming to emulate their impressive scalability and generalizability. Trailblazing efforts like VQGAN and DALL-E [19, 51] along with their successors [52, 71, 37, 77] have showcased the potential of AR models in image generation. These models utilize a visual tokenizer to discretize continuous images into grids of 2D tokens, which are then flattened to a 1D sequence for AR learning (Fig. 2 b), mirroring the process of sequential language modeling (Fig. 2 a). However, the scaling laws of these models remain underexplored, and more frustratingly, their performance significantly lags behind diffusion models [46, 2, 38], as shown in Fig. 3. In contrast to the remarkable achievements of LLMs, the power of autoregressive models in computer vision appears to be somewhat locked.
items.zh: 与此同时，计算机视觉领域一直致力于开发大型自回归或世界模型[42, 68, 5]，旨在模仿它们令人印象深刻的可扩展性和泛化能力。VQGAN和DALL-E[19, 51]及其后继者[52, 71, 37, 77]等开创性工作展示了AR模型在图像生成中的潜力。这些模型利用视觉分词器将连续图像离散化为2D标记网格，然后展平为1D序列进行AR学习（图2b），模仿顺序语言建模的过程（图2a）。然而，这些模型的缩放定律仍未得到充分探索，更令人沮丧的是，它们的性能显著落后于扩散模型[46, 2, 38]，如图3所示。与LLM的显著成就相比，自回归模型在计算机视觉中的力量似乎有些受限。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Scaling behavior of different models on ImageNet 256×\times256 conditional generation benchmark. The FID of the validation set serves as a reference lower bound (1.78). VAR with 2B parameters reaches FID 1.80, surpassing L-DiT with 3B or 7B parameters.
items.capZh: 图3：不同模型在ImageNet 256×256条件生成基准上的缩放行为。验证集的FID作为参考下界（1.78）。具有2B参数的VAR达到FID 1.80，超过了具有3B或7B参数的L-DiT。

items.en: Autoregressive modeling requires defining the order of data. Our work reconsiders how to “order” an image. Humans typically perceive or create images in a hierachical manner, first capturing the global structure and then local details. This multi-scale, coarse-to-fine method naturally suggests an “order” for images. Also inspired by the widespread multi-scale designs [40, 39, 62, 31, 33], we define autoregressive learning for images as “next-scale prediction” in Fig. 2 (c), diverging from the conventional “next-token prediction” in Fig. 2 (b). Our approach begins by encoding an image into multi-scale token maps. The autoregressive process is then started from the 1×\times1 token map, and progressively expands in resolution: at each step, the transformer predicts the next higher-resolution token map conditioned on all previous ones. We refer to this methodology as Visual AutoRegressive (VAR) modeling.
items.zh: 自回归建模需要定义数据的顺序。我们的工作重新考虑了如何“排序”图像。人类通常以层次方式感知或创建图像，首先捕捉全局结构，然后是局部细节。这种多尺度、从粗到细的方法自然地暗示了图像的“顺序”。受广泛的多尺度设计[40, 39, 62, 31, 33]的启发，我们在图2(c)中将图像的自回归学习定义为“下一尺度预测”，与图2(b)中传统的“下一个词预测”不同。我们的方法首先将图像编码为多尺度标记图。然后从1×1标记图开始自回归过程，并逐步扩展分辨率：在每一步，Transformer基于所有先前的标记图预测下一个更高分辨率的标记图。我们将这种方法称为视觉自回归（VAR）建模。

items.en: VAR directly leverages GPT-2-like transformer architecture [49] for visual autoregressive learning. On the ImageNet 256×\times256 benchmark, VAR significantly improves its AR baseline, achieving a Fréchet inception distance (FID) of 1.80 and an inception score (IS) of 356.4, with inference speed 20×\times faster (see Sec. 4.4 for details). Notably, VAR surpasses the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) – the foundation of leading diffusion systems like Stable Diffusion 3.0 and SORA [18, 8] – in FID/IS, data efficiency, inference speed, and scalability. VAR models also exhibit scaling laws akin to those witnessed in LLMs. Lastly, we showcase VAR’s zero-shot generalization capabilities in tasks like image in-painting, out-painting, and editing. In summary, our contributions to the community include:
items.zh: VAR直接利用类似GPT-2的Transformer架构[49]进行视觉自回归学习。在ImageNet 256×256基准上，VAR显著改进了其AR基线，实现了Fréchet初始距离（FID）为1.80，初始分数（IS）为356.4，推理速度提升20倍（详见第4.4节）。值得注意的是，VAR在FID/IS、数据效率、推理速度和可扩展性方面均优于扩散Transformer（DiT）——这是Stable Diffusion 3.0和SORA[18, 8]等领先扩散系统的基础。VAR模型还表现出与LLM中类似的缩放定律。最后，我们展示了VAR在图像修复、外推和编辑等任务中的零样本泛化能力。总之，我们对社区的贡献包括：

items.en: A new visual generative framework using a multi-scale autoregressive paradigm with next-scale prediction, offering new insights in autoregressive algorithm design for computer vision.
items.zh: 一种新的视觉生成框架，使用多尺度自回归范式和下一尺度预测，为计算机视觉中的自回归算法设计提供了新见解。

items.en: An empirical validation of VAR models’ Scaling Laws and zero-shot generalization potential, which initially emulates the appealing properties of large language models (LLMs).
items.zh: 对VAR模型的缩放定律和零样本泛化潜力的实证验证，初步模拟了大语言模型（LLM）的吸引人特性。

items.en: A breakthrough in visual autoregressive model performance, making GPT-style autoregressive methods surpass strong diffusion models in image synthesis for the first time111 A related work [74] named “language model beats diffusion” belongs to BERT-style masked-prediction model. .
items.zh: 视觉自回归模型性能的突破，首次使GPT风格的自回归方法在图像合成中超越强扩散模型。

items.en: A comprehensive open-source code suite, including both VQ tokenizer and autoregressive model training pipelines, to help propel the advancement of visual autoregressive learning.
items.zh: 一个全面的开源代码套件，包括VQ分词器和自回归模型训练流程，以推动视觉自回归学习的进步。

full.sec: 2.1 Properties of large autoregressive language models
full.secZh: 2.1 大型自回归语言模型的性质

items.en: Scaling laws. Power-law scaling laws [22, 30] mathematically describe the relationship between the growth of model parameters, dataset sizes, computational resources, and the performance improvements of machine learning models, conferring several distinct benefits. First, they facilitate the extrapolation of a larger model’s performance through the scaling up of model size, data size, and computational cost. This helps save unnecessary costs and provides principles to allocate the training budget. Second, the scaling laws have evidenced a consistent and non-saturating increase in performance, corroborating their sustained advantage in enhancing model capability. Propelled by the principles of scaling laws in neural language models [30], several Large Language Models [9, 76, 70, 27, 63, 64] have been proposed, embodying the principle that increasing the scale of models tends to yield enhanced performance outcomes. GPT [49, 9], predicated on a transformer decoder architecture, undergoes generative pre-training and scales the model size to an unprecedented 175B parameters. LLama [63, 64] release a collection of pre-trained and fine-tuned large language models (LLMs) ranging in scale from 7 billion to 70 billion parameters. The manifest efficacy of scaling laws applied to language models has proffered a glimpse into the promising potential of upscale in visual models [5].
items.zh: 缩放定律。幂律缩放定律[22, 30]数学描述了模型参数、数据集大小、计算资源的增长与机器学习模型性能提升之间的关系，带来了几个显著的好处。首先，它们有助于通过扩展模型大小、数据大小和计算成本来外推更大模型的性能。这有助于节省不必要的成本，并提供分配训练预算的原则。其次，缩放定律证明了性能的一致且非饱和的增长，证实了它们在增强模型能力方面的持续优势。受神经语言模型中缩放定律原理[30]的推动，提出了几个大语言模型[9, 76, 70, 27, 63, 64]，体现了增加模型规模往往会产生更好性能结果的原则。GPT[49, 9]基于Transformer解码器架构，进行生成式预训练，并将模型规模扩展到前所未有的175B参数。LLama[63, 64]发布了一系列预训练和微调的大语言模型（LLM），规模从70亿到700亿参数不等。缩放定律在语言模型中的显著有效性为视觉模型[5]的扩展提供了有希望的前景。

items.en: Zero-shot generalization. Zero-shot generalization [55] refers to the ability of a model, particularly a Large Language Model, to perform tasks that it has not been explicitly trained on. Within the realm of the vision community, there is a burgeoning interest in the zero-shot and in-context learning abilities of foundation models, CLIP [47], SAM [35], Dinov2 [44]. Innovations like Painter [69] and LVM [5] have leveraged visual prompts to design in-context learning paradigms, thereby facilitating the generalization to downstream unseen tasks.
items.zh: 零样本泛化。零样本泛化[55]是指模型（特别是大语言模型）执行未明确训练过的任务的能力。在视觉社区中，对基础模型（如CLIP[47]、SAM[35]、Dinov2[44]）的零样本和上下文学习能力越来越感兴趣。Painter[69]和LVM[5]等创新利用视觉提示设计上下文学习范式，从而促进对下游未见任务的泛化。

items.en: Image tokenizer and autoregressive models. Language models [15, 49, 63] rely on Byte Pair Encoding (BPE [20]) or WordPiece algorithms for text tokenization. Visual generation models based on language models also necessitate the encoding of 2D images into 1D token sequences. Early endeavors VQVAE [65] have demonstrated the ability to represent images as discrete tokens, although the reconstruction quality was relatively moderate. VQGAN [19] advances VQVAE by incorporating adversarial loss and perceptual loss to improve image fidelity, and employs a decoder-only transformer to generate image tokens in standard raster-scan autoregressive manner. VQVAE-2 [52] and RQ-Transformer [37] also follow VQGAN’s raster-scan autoregressive method but further improve VQVAE via extra scales or stacked codes. Parti [72] capitalizes on the foundational architecture of ViT-VQGAN [71] to scale the transformer model size to 20 billion parameters, achieving remarkable results in text-to-image synthesis.
items.zh: 图像分词器和自回归模型。语言模型[15, 49, 63]依赖字节对编码（BPE[20]）或WordPiece算法进行文本分词。基于语言模型的视觉生成模型也需要将2D图像编码为1D标记序列。早期工作VQVAE[65]展示了将图像表示为离散标记的能力，尽管重建质量相对中等。VQGAN[19]通过引入对抗损失和感知损失改进了VQVAE，提高了图像保真度，并使用仅解码器Transformer以标准栅格扫描自回归方式生成图像标记。VQVAE-2[52]和RQ-Transformer[37]也遵循VQGAN的栅格扫描自回归方法，但通过额外尺度或堆叠代码进一步改进了VQVAE。Parti[72]利用ViT-VQGAN[71]的基础架构将Transformer模型规模扩展到200亿参数，在文本到图像合成中取得了显著成果。

items.en: Masked-prediction model. MaskGIT [11] employs a masked prediction framework [15, 6, 21] alongside a VQ autoencoder to generate image tokens based through a “greedy” algorithm. MagViT [73] adapts this approach to video data, and MagViT-2 [74] enhances MaskGIT by introducing an improved VQVAE. MUSE [10] scales MaskGIT’s architecture to 3 billion parameters and merges it with the T5 language model [50], setting new benchmarks in text-to-image synthesis.
items.zh: 掩码预测模型。MaskGIT[11]采用掩码预测框架[15, 6, 21]和VQ自编码器，通过“贪婪”算法生成图像标记。MagViT[73]将该方法适应于视频数据，MagViT-2[74]通过引入改进的VQVAE增强了MaskGIT。MUSE[10]将MaskGIT的架构扩展到30亿参数，并与T5语言模型[50]合并，在文本到图像合成中树立了新基准。

items.en: Diffusion models [23, 59, 16, 53] are considered the forefront of visual synthesis, given their superior generation quality and diversity. Progress in diffusion models has centered around improved sampling techniques[26], faster sampling [58, 41], and architectural enhancements [53, 24, 54, 46]. Imagen [54] incorporates the T5 language model [50] for text condition and builds an image generation system through multiple independent diffusion models for cascaded generation and super resolution. Latent Diffusion Models (LDM)[53] apply diffusion in latent space, improving efficiency in training and inference. DiT[46] replaces the traditional U-Net with a transformer-based architecture [66, 17], and is used in recent image or video synthesis systems like Stable Diffusion 3.0 [18] and SORA [8].
items.zh: 扩散模型[23, 59, 16, 53]因其优越的生成质量和多样性被认为是视觉合成的前沿。扩散模型的进展集中在改进采样技术[26]、更快采样[58, 41]和架构增强[53, 24, 54, 46]上。Imagen[54]结合T5语言模型[50]进行文本条件，并通过多个独立扩散模型构建级联生成和超分辨率的图像生成系统。潜在扩散模型（LDM）[53]在潜在空间中应用扩散，提高了训练和推理效率。DiT[46]用基于Transformer的架构[66, 17]取代了传统的U-Net，并用于最近的图像或视频合成系统，如Stable Diffusion 3.0[18]和SORA[8]。

full.sec: 3.1 Preliminary: autoregressive modeling via next-token prediction
full.secZh: 3.1 预备知识：基于下一词元预测的自回归建模

items.en: Formulation. Consider a sequence of discrete tokens x=(x1,x2,…,xT)𝑥subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑇x=(x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{T}), where each token xt∈[V]subscript𝑥𝑡delimited-[]𝑉x_{t}\in[V] is an integer from a vocabulary of size V𝑉V. The next-token autoregressive model posits that the probability of observing the current token xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} depends only on its prefix (x1,x2,…,xt−1)subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑡1(x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{t-1}). This assumption of unidirectional token dependency allows us to decompose the likelihood of sequence x𝑥x into the product of T𝑇T conditional probabilities:
items.zh: 公式化。考虑一个离散标记序列 x=(x1,x2,…,xT)，其中每个标记 xt∈[V] 是来自大小为 V 的词汇表的整数。下一个词自回归模型假设观察到当前标记 xt 的概率仅取决于其前缀 (x1,x2,…,xt−1)。这种单向标记依赖的假设允许我们将序列 x 的似然分解为 T 个条件概率的乘积：

items.en: Training an autoregressive model pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta} parameterized by θ𝜃\theta involves optimizing the pθ​(xt∣x1,x2,…,xt−1)subscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑡1p_{\theta}(x_{t}\mid x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{t-1}) across a dataset. This optimization process is known as the “next-token prediction”, and the trained pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta} can generate new sequences.
items.zh: 训练由 θ 参数化的自回归模型 pθ 涉及优化 pθ(xt∣x1,x2,…,xt−1) 在整个数据集上。这个优化过程被称为“下一个词预测”，训练后的 pθ 可以生成新序列。

items.en: Tokenization. Images are inherently 2D continuous signals. To apply autoregressive modeling to images via next-token prediction, we must: 1) tokenize an image into several discrete tokens, and 2) define a 1D order of tokens for unidirectional modeling. For 1), a quantized autoencoder such as [19] is often used to convert the image feature map f∈ℝh×w×C𝑓superscriptℝℎ𝑤𝐶f\in\mathbb{R}^{h\times w\times C} to discrete tokens q∈[V]h×w𝑞superscriptdelimited-[]𝑉ℎ𝑤q\in[V]^{h\times w}:
items.zh: 分词化。图像本质上是2D连续信号。要通过下一个词预测将自回归建模应用于图像，我们必须：1) 将图像分词为多个离散标记，2) 定义用于单向建模的1D标记顺序。对于1)，通常使用量化自编码器（如[19]）将图像特征图 f∈ℝh×w×C 转换为离散标记 q∈[V]h×w：

items.en: where i​m𝑖𝑚im denotes the raw image, ℰ​(⋅)ℰ⋅\mathcal{E}(\cdot) a encoder, and 𝒬​(⋅)𝒬⋅\mathcal{Q}(\cdot) a quantizer. The quantizer typically includes a learnable codebook Z∈ℝV×C𝑍superscriptℝ𝑉𝐶Z\in\mathbb{R}^{V\times C} containing V𝑉V vectors. The quantization process q=𝒬​(f)𝑞𝒬𝑓q=\mathcal{Q}(f) will map each feature vector f(i,j)superscript𝑓𝑖𝑗f^{(i,j)} to the code index q(i,j)superscript𝑞𝑖𝑗q^{(i,j)} of its nearest code in the Euclidean sense:
items.zh: 其中 i​m 表示原始图像，ℰ(⋅) 是编码器，𝒬(⋅) 是量化器。量化器通常包含一个可学习的码本 Z∈ℝ^{V×C}，其中包含 V 个向量。量化过程 q=𝒬(f) 会将每个特征向量 f^{(i,j)} 映射到其最近码的码索引 q^{(i,j)}（按欧几里得距离）：

items.en: where lookup​(Z,v)lookup𝑍𝑣\text{lookup}(Z,v) means taking the v𝑣v-th vector in codebook Z𝑍Z. To train the quantized autoencoder, Z𝑍Z is looked up by every q(i,j)superscript𝑞𝑖𝑗q^{(i,j)} to get f^^𝑓\hat{f}, the approximation of original f𝑓f. Then a new image i​m^^𝑖𝑚\hat{im} is reconstructed using the decoder 𝒟​(⋅)𝒟⋅\mathcal{D}(\cdot) given f^^𝑓\hat{f}, and a compound loss ℒℒ\mathcal{L} is minimized:
items.zh: 其中 lookup(Z,v) 表示取码本 Z 中的第 v 个向量。为了训练量化自编码器，每个 q^{(i,j)} 通过 lookup 得到 f̂，即原始 f 的近似。然后，给定 f̂，使用解码器 𝒟(⋅) 重建新图像 i​m̂，并最小化复合损失 ℒ：

items.en: where ℒP​(⋅)subscriptℒP⋅\mathcal{L}_{\text{P}}(\cdot) is a perceptual loss such as LPIPS [75], ℒG​(⋅)subscriptℒG⋅\mathcal{L}_{\text{G}}(\cdot) a discriminative loss like StyleGAN’s discriminator loss [33], and λPsubscript𝜆P\lambda_{\text{P}}, λGsubscript𝜆G\lambda_{\text{G}} are loss weights. Once the autoencoder {ℰ,𝒬,𝒟}ℰ𝒬𝒟\{\mathcal{E},\mathcal{Q},\mathcal{D}\} is fully trained, it will be used to tokenize images for subsequent training of a unidirectional autoregressive model.
items.zh: 其中 ℒ_P(⋅) 是感知损失（如 LPIPS [75]），ℒ_G(⋅) 是判别损失（如 StyleGAN 的判别器损失 [33]），λ_P 和 λ_G 是损失权重。一旦自编码器 {ℰ,𝒬,𝒟} 完全训练好，它将用于将图像标记化，以便后续训练单向自回归模型。

items.en: The image tokens in q∈[V]h×w𝑞superscriptdelimited-[]𝑉ℎ𝑤q\in[V]^{h\times w} are arranged in a 2D grid. Unlike natural language sentences with an inherent left-to-right ordering, the order of image tokens must be explicitly defined for unidirectional autoregressive learning. Previous AR methods [19, 71, 37] flatten the 2D grid of q𝑞q into a 1D sequence x=(x1,…,xh×w)𝑥subscript𝑥1…subscript𝑥ℎ𝑤x=(x_{1},\dots,x_{h\times w}) using some strategy such as row-major raster scan, spiral, or z-curve order. Once flattened, they can extract a set of sequences x𝑥x from the dataset, and then train an autoregressive model to maximize the likelihood in (1) via next-token prediction.
items.zh: 图像标记 q∈[V]^{h×w} 以二维网格排列。与具有固有从左到右顺序的自然语言句子不同，图像标记的顺序必须为单向自回归学习明确定义。先前的自回归方法 [19, 71, 37] 使用某种策略（如行主序光栅扫描、螺旋或 z 曲线顺序）将 q 的二维网格展平为一维序列 x=(x_1,…,x_{h×w})。展平后，他们可以从数据集中提取一组序列 x，然后训练自回归模型，通过下一个词预测最大化 (1) 中的似然。

items.capEn: Figure 4: VAR involves two separated training stages. Left: a multi-scale quantized autoencoder (VQVAE) encode an image into K𝐾K token maps R=(r1,r2,…,rK)𝑅subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝐾R=(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{K}) and is trained by a compound reconstruction loss (5). “Embedding” in the figure means converting discrete tokens into continuous embedding vectors. Right: a VAR transformer is trained by maximizing the likelihood or minimizing the cross-entropy loss in (6) via next-scale prediction. the trained VQVAE is used to produce token map ground truth R=(r1,r2,…,rK)𝑅subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝐾R=(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{K}) for VAR model.
items.capZh: 图 4：VAR 涉及两个分离的训练阶段。左：多尺度量化自编码器 (VQVAE) 将图像编码为 K 个标记图 R=(r_1,r_2,…,r_K)，并通过复合重建损失 (5) 进行训练。图中的“Embedding”表示将离散标记转换为连续嵌入向量。右：VAR Transformer 通过最大化似然或最小化 (6) 中的交叉熵损失（通过下一尺度预测）进行训练。训练好的 VQVAE 用于生成 VAR 模型的标记图真值 R=(r_1,r_2,…,r_K)。

items.en: Discussion. The above tokenizing and flattening enable next-token autoregressive learning on images, but they introduce several issues:
items.zh: 讨论。上述标记化和展平使得图像上的下一个词自回归学习成为可能，但它们引入了几个问题：

items.en: Mathematical premise violation. Image encoders typically produce image feature map f𝑓f with inter-dependent feature vectors f(i,j)superscript𝑓𝑖𝑗f^{(i,j)} for all i,j𝑖𝑗i,j. So after quantization and flattening, the sequence of tokens (x1,x2,…,xh×w)subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥ℎ𝑤(x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{h\times w}) exhibits bidirectional correlations. This contradicts the unidirectional dependency assumption of autoregressive models, which dictates that each token xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} should only depend on its prefix (x1,x2,…,xt−1)subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑡1(x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{t-1}).
items.zh: 数学前提违背。图像编码器通常生成图像特征图 f，其特征向量 f^{(i,j)} 对于所有 i,j 相互依赖。因此，在量化和展平后，标记序列 (x_1,x_2,…,x_{h×w}) 表现出双向相关性。这与自回归模型的单向依赖假设相矛盾，该假设规定每个标记 x_t 应仅依赖于其前缀 (x_1,x_2,…,x_{t-1})。

items.en: Structural degradation. The flattening disrupts the spatial locality inherent in image feature maps. For instance, the token q(i,j)superscript𝑞𝑖𝑗q^{(i,j)} and its 4 immediate neighbors q(i±1,j)superscript𝑞plus-or-minus𝑖1𝑗q^{(i\pm 1,j)}, q(i,j±1)superscript𝑞𝑖plus-or-minus𝑗1q^{(i,j\pm 1)} are closely correlated due to their proximity. This spatial relationship is compromised in the linear sequence x𝑥x, where unidirectional constraints diminish these correlations.
items.zh: 结构退化。展平破坏了图像特征图中固有的空间局部性。例如，标记 q^{(i,j)} 及其 4 个直接邻居 q^{(i±1,j)}、q^{(i,j±1)} 由于邻近性而紧密相关。这种空间关系在线性序列 x 中受到损害，其中单向约束削弱了这些相关性。

items.en: Inefficiency. Generating an image token sequence x=(x1,x2,…,xn×n)𝑥subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑛𝑛x=(x_{1},x_{2},\dots,x_{n\times n}) with a conventional self-attention transformer incurs 𝒪​(n2)𝒪superscript𝑛2\mathcal{O}(n^{2}) autoregressive steps and 𝒪​(n6)𝒪superscript𝑛6\mathcal{O}(n^{6}) computational cost.
items.zh: 低效。使用传统的自注意力 Transformer 生成图像标记序列 x=(x_1,x_2,…,x_{n×n}) 需要 𝒪(n^2) 个自回归步骤和 𝒪(n^6) 的计算成本。

items.en: The disruption of spatial locality (issue 2) is obvious. Regarding issue 1, we present empirical evidence in the Appendix, analyzing the token dependencies in the popular quantized autoencoder [19] and revealing significant bidirectional correlations. The proof of computational complexity for issue 3 is detailed in the Appendix. These theoretical and practical limitations call for a rethinking of autoregressive models in the context of image generation.
items.zh: 空间局部性的破坏（问题 2）是显而易见的。关于问题 1，我们在附录中提供了经验证据，分析了流行量化自编码器 [19] 中的标记依赖性，并揭示了显著的双向相关性。问题 3 的计算复杂度证明详见附录。这些理论和实践限制要求重新思考图像生成背景下的自回归模型。

full.sec: 3.2 Visual autoregressive modeling via next-scale prediction
full.secZh: 3.2 视觉自回归建模：基于下一尺度预测

items.en: Reformulation. We reconceptualize the autoregressive modeling on images by shifting from “next-token prediction” to “next-scale prediction” strategy. Here, the autoregressive unit is an entire token map, rather than a single token. We start by quantizing a feature map f∈ℝh×w×C𝑓superscriptℝℎ𝑤𝐶f\in\mathbb{R}^{h\times w\times C} into K𝐾K multi-scale token maps (r1,r2,…,rK)subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝐾(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{K}), each at a increasingly higher resolution hk×wksubscriptℎ𝑘subscript𝑤𝑘h_{k}\times w_{k}, culminating in rKsubscript𝑟𝐾r_{K} matches the original feature map’s resolution h×wℎ𝑤h\times w. The autoregressive likelihood is formulated as:
items.zh: 重新表述。我们通过从“下一个词预测”转向“下一尺度预测”策略，重新概念化图像上的自回归建模。这里，自回归单元是整个标记图，而不是单个标记。我们首先将特征图 f∈ℝ^{h×w×C} 量化为 K 个多尺度标记图 (r_1,r_2,…,r_K)，每个图具有递增的分辨率 h_k×w_k，最终 r_K 匹配原始特征图的分辨率 h×w。自回归似然公式化为：

items.en: where each autoregressive unit rk∈[V]hk×wksubscript𝑟𝑘superscriptdelimited-[]𝑉subscriptℎ𝑘subscript𝑤𝑘r_{k}\in[V]^{h_{k}\times w_{k}} is the token map at scale k𝑘k, and the sequence (r1,r2,…,rk−1)subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝑘1(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{k-1}) serves as the the “prefix” for rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k}. During the k𝑘k-th autoregressive step, all distributions over the hk×wksubscriptℎ𝑘subscript𝑤𝑘h_{k}\times w_{k} tokens in rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k} are inter-dependent and will be generated in parallel, conditioned on rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k}’s prefix and associated k𝑘k-th position embedding map. This “next-scale prediction” methodology is what we define as visual autoregressive modeling (VAR), depicted on the right side of Fig. 4.
items.zh: 其中每个自回归单元 r_k∈[V]^{h_k×w_k} 是尺度 k 的标记图，序列 (r_1,r_2,…,r_{k-1}) 作为 r_k 的“前缀”。在第 k 个自回归步骤中，r_k 中 h_k×w_k 个标记上的所有分布相互依赖，并将并行生成，条件为 r_k 的前缀和相关的第 k 个位置嵌入图。这种“下一尺度预测”方法就是我们定义的视觉自回归建模 (VAR)，如图 4 右侧所示。

items.en: Discussion. VAR addresses the previously mentioned three issues as follows:
items.zh: 讨论。VAR 解决了上述三个问题，具体如下：

items.en: The mathematical premise is satisfied if we constrain each rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k} to depend only on its prefix, that is, the process of getting rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k} is solely related to (r1,r2,…,rk−1)subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝑘1(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{k-1}). This constraint is acceptable as it aligns with the natural, coarse-to-fine progression characteristics like human visual perception and artistic drawing. Further details are provided in the Tokenization below.
items.zh: 如果我们约束每个 r_k 仅依赖于其前缀，即获取 r_k 的过程仅与 (r_1,r_2,…,r_{k-1}) 相关，则数学前提得到满足。这个约束是可接受的，因为它符合自然的从粗到细的进展特征，如人类视觉感知和艺术绘画。更多细节见下面的标记化部分。

items.en: The spatial locality is preserved as (i) there is no flattening operation in VAR, and (ii) tokens in each rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k} are fully correlated. The multi-scale design additionally reinforces the spatial structure.
items.zh: 空间局部性得以保留，因为 (i) VAR 中没有展平操作，并且 (ii) 每个 r_k 中的标记完全相关。多尺度设计进一步强化了空间结构。

items.en: The complexity for generating an image with n×n𝑛𝑛n\times n latent is significantly reduced to 𝒪​(n4)𝒪superscript𝑛4\mathcal{O}(n^{4}), see Appendix for proof. This efficiency gain arises from the parallel token generation in each rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k}.
items.zh: 生成具有 n×n 潜变量的图像的复杂度显著降低到 𝒪(n^4)，证明见附录。这种效率提升源于每个 r_k 中的并行标记生成。

items.en: Tokenization. We develope a new multi-scale quantization autoencoder to encode an image to K𝐾K multi-scale discrete token maps R=(r1,r2,…,rK)𝑅subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝐾R=(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{K}) necessary for VAR learning (6). We employ the same architecture as VQGAN [19] but with a modified multi-scale quantization layer. The encoding and decoding procedures with residual design on f𝑓f or f^^𝑓\hat{f} are detailed in algorithms 1 and 2. We empirically find this residual-style design, akin to [37], can perform better than independent interpolation. Algorithm 1 shows that each rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k} would depend only on its prefix (r1,r2,…,rk−1)subscript𝑟1subscript𝑟2…subscript𝑟𝑘1(r_{1},r_{2},\dots,r_{k-1}). Note that a shared codebook Z𝑍Z is utilized across all scales, ensuring that each rksubscript𝑟𝑘r_{k}’s tokens belong to the same vocabulary [V]delimited-[]𝑉[V]. To address the information loss in upscaling zksubscript𝑧𝑘z_{k} to hK×wKsubscriptℎ𝐾subscript𝑤𝐾h_{K}\times w_{K}, we use K𝐾K extra convolution layers {ϕk}k=1Ksuperscriptsubscriptsubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑘𝑘1𝐾\{\phi_{k}\}_{k=1}^{K}. No convolution is used after downsampling f𝑓f to hk×wksubscriptℎ𝑘subscript𝑤𝑘h_{k}\times w_{k}.
items.zh: 标记化。我们开发了一种新的多尺度量化自编码器，将图像编码为 K 个多尺度离散标记图 R=(r_1,r_2,…,r_K)，这是 VAR 学习 (6) 所必需的。我们采用与 VQGAN [19] 相同的架构，但修改了多尺度量化层。关于 f 或 f̂ 的残差设计的编码和解码过程详见算法 1 和 2。我们凭经验发现，这种类似于 [37] 的残差风格设计比独立插值表现更好。算法 1 显示每个 r_k 仅依赖于其前缀 (r_1,r_2,…,r_{k-1})。注意，所有尺度共享一个码本 Z，确保每个 r_k 的标记属于同一词汇表 [V]。为了解决将 z_k 上采样到 h_K×w_K 时的信息损失，我们使用了 K 个额外的卷积层 {φ_k}_{k=1}^K。在将 f 下采样到 h_k×w_k 后不使用卷积。

items.en: VAR tokenizer. As aforementioned, we use the vanilla VQVAE architecture [19] with a multi-scale quantization scheme with K𝐾K extra convolutions (0.03M extra parameters). We use a shared codebook for all scales with V=4096𝑉4096V=4096 and a latent dim of 32. Following the baseline [19], our tokenizer is also trained on OpenImages [36] with the compound loss (5). See the Appendix for more details.
items.zh: VAR 分词器。如前所述，我们使用带有 K 个额外卷积（0.03M 额外参数）的多尺度量化方案的普通 VQVAE 架构 [19]。我们对所有尺度使用共享码本，V=4096，潜变量维度为 32。遵循基线 [19]，我们的分词器也在 OpenImages [36] 上使用复合损失 (5) 进行训练。更多细节见附录。

items.en: VAR transformer. Our main focus is on VAR algorithm so we keep a simple model architecture design. We adopt the architecture of standard decoder-only transformers akin to GPT-2 and VQGAN [49, 19], with the only modification of substituting traditional layer normalization for adaptive normalization (AdaLN) – a choice motivated by its widespread adoption and proven effectiveness in visual generative models [33, 34, 32, 57, 56, 29, 46, 12]. For class-conditional synthesis, we use the class embedding as the start token [s] and also the condition of AdaLN. We do not use advanced techniques in modern large language models, such as rotary position embedding (RoPE), SwiGLU MLP, or RMS Norm [63, 64]. Our model shape hyperparameter follows a simple rule [30] that the width w𝑤w, head counts hℎh, and drop rate d​r𝑑𝑟dr are linearly scaled with the depth d𝑑d as follows:
items.zh: VAR Transformer。我们的主要关注点是 VAR 算法，因此我们保持简单的模型架构设计。我们采用类似于 GPT-2 和 VQGAN [49, 19] 的标准仅解码器 Transformer 架构，唯一的修改是将传统的层归一化替换为自适应归一化 (AdaLN)——这一选择源于其在视觉生成模型中的广泛采用和 proven 有效性 [33, 34, 32, 57, 56, 29, 46, 12]。对于类条件合成，我们使用类嵌入作为起始标记 [s] 以及 AdaLN 的条件。我们不使用现代大型语言模型中的先进技术，如旋转位置嵌入 (RoPE)、SwiGLU MLP 或 RMS Norm [63, 64]。我们的模型形状超参数遵循简单规则 [30]，即宽度 w、头数 h 和丢弃率 dr 随深度 d 线性缩放，如下所示：

items.en: All models are trained with the similar settings: a base learning rate of 10−4superscript10410^{-4} per 256 batch size, an AdamW optimizer with β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.95subscript𝛽20.95\beta_{2}=0.95, decay=0.05decay0.05\text{decay}=0.05, a batch size from 512 to 1024 and training epochs from 200 to 350 (depends on model size). Our subsequent evaluations in Sec. 4 will suggest that such a simple model design are capable of scaling and generalizing well.
items.zh: 所有模型均采用相似设置进行训练：基础学习率为每256批次10⁻⁴，AdamW优化器参数β₁=0.9、β₂=0.95、衰减=0.05，批次大小从512到1024，训练轮次从200到350（取决于模型大小）。我们在第4节中的后续评估将表明，这种简单的模型设计能够很好地扩展和泛化。

items.en: This section first compares VAR with other image generative model families333For fairness, methods with advanced VQVAE are excluded in this model family comparison, e.g. the BERT-style masked-pred model MagViT-2 [74]. Practitioners can combine them with VAR for better results. in terms of performance and and efficiency in Sec. 4.1. Evaluations on the scalability and generalizability of VAR models are presented in Sec. 4.2 and Sec. 4.3. We do some ablations and visualizations at the end.
items.zh: 本节首先在第4.1节中将VAR与其他图像生成模型家族进行性能和效率比较。第4.2节和第4.3节评估VAR模型的可扩展性和泛化能力。最后进行消融实验和可视化。

items.en: Setup. We test VAR models with depths 16, 20, 24, and 30 on ImageNet 256×\times256 and 512×\times512 conditional generation benchmarks and compare them with the state-of-the-art image generation model families. Among all VQVAE-based AR or VAR models, VQGAN [19] and ours use the same architecture (CNN) and training data (OpenImages [36]) for VQVAE, while ViT-VQGAN [71] uses a ViT autoencoder, and both it and RQTransformer [37] trains the VQVAE directly on ImageNet. The results are summaried in Tab. 1 and Tab. 2.
items.zh: 设置。我们在ImageNet 256×256和512×512条件生成基准上测试深度为16、20、24和30的VAR模型，并与最先进的图像生成模型家族进行比较。在所有基于VQVAE的AR或VAR模型中，VQGAN [19]和我们的模型使用相同的VQVAE架构（CNN）和训练数据（OpenImages [36]），而ViT-VQGAN [71]使用ViT自编码器，RQTransformer [37]直接在ImageNet上训练VQVAE。结果总结在表1和表2中。

items.en: Overall comparison. In comparison with existing generative approaches including generative adversarial networks (GAN), diffusion models (Diff.), BERT-style masked-prediction models (Mask.), and GPT-style autoregressive models (AR), our visual autoregressive (VAR) establishes a new model class. As shown in Tab. 1, VAR not only achieves the best FID/IS but also demonstrates remarkable speed in image generation. VAR also maintains decent precision and recall, confirming its semantic consistency. These advantages hold true on the 512×\times512 synthesis benchmark, as detailed in Tab. 2. Notably, VAR significantly advances traditional AR capabilities. To our knowledge, this is the first time of autoregressive models outperforming Diffusion transformers, a milestone made possible by VAR’s resolution of AR limitations discussed in Section 3.
items.zh: 总体比较。与现有生成方法（包括生成对抗网络（GAN）、扩散模型（Diff.）、BERT风格掩码预测模型（Mask.）和GPT风格自回归模型（AR））相比，我们的视觉自回归（VAR）建立了一个新的模型类别。如表1所示，VAR不仅实现了最佳的FID/IS，而且在图像生成速度上表现出色。VAR还保持了良好的精度和召回率，证实了其语义一致性。这些优势在512×512合成基准上同样成立，详见表2。值得注意的是，VAR显著提升了传统AR的能力。据我们所知，这是自回归模型首次超越扩散Transformer，这一里程碑得益于VAR解决了第3节中讨论的AR局限性。

items.en: Efficiency comparison. Conventional autoregressive (AR) models [19, 52, 71, 37] suffer a lot from the high computational cost, as the number of image tokens is quadratic to the image resolution. A full autoregressive generation of n2superscript𝑛2n^{2} tokens requires 𝒪​(n2)𝒪superscript𝑛2\mathcal{O}(n^{2}) decoding iterations and 𝒪​(n6)𝒪superscript𝑛6\mathcal{O}(n^{6}) total computations. In contrast, VAR only requires 𝒪​(log⁡(n))𝒪𝑛\mathcal{O}(\log(n)) iterations and 𝒪​(n4)𝒪superscript𝑛4\mathcal{O}(n^{4}) total computations. The wall-clock time reported in Tab. 1 also provides empirical evidence that VAR is around 20 times faster than VQGAN and ViT-VQGAN even with more model parameters, reaching the speed of efficient GAN models which only require 1 step to generate an image.
items.zh: 效率比较。传统的自回归（AR）模型 [19, 52, 71, 37] 由于计算成本高而受到很大影响，因为图像令牌数量与图像分辨率呈二次关系。完整自回归生成n²个令牌需要𝒪(n²)次解码迭代和𝒪(n⁶)总计算量。相比之下，VAR仅需𝒪(log n)次迭代和𝒪(n⁴)总计算量。表1中报告的挂钟时间也提供了经验证据，表明即使模型参数更多，VAR也比VQGAN和ViT-VQGAN快约20倍，达到了仅需1步生成图像的GAN模型的速度。

items.en: Compared with popular diffusion transformer.444[46] do not report DiT-L/2’s performance with CFG so we use official code to reproduce it. The VAR model surpasses the recently popular diffusion models Diffusion Transformer (DiT), which serves as the precursor to the latest Stable-Diffusion 3 [18] and SORA [8], in multiple dimensions: 1) In image generation diversity and quality (FID and IS), VAR with 2B parameters consistently performs better than DiT-XL/2 [46], L-DiT-3B, and L-DiT-7B [2]. VAR also maintains comparable precision and recall. 2) For inference speed, the DiT-XL/2 requires 45×\times the wall-clock time compared to VAR, while 3B and 7B models [2] would cost much more. 3) VAR is considered more data-efficient, as it requires only 350 training epochs compared to DiT-XL/2’s 1400. 4) For scalability, Fig. 3 and Tab. 1 show that DiT only obtains marginal or even negative gains beyond 675M parameters. In contrast, the FID and IS of VAR are consistently improved, aligning with the scaling law study in Sec. 4.2. These results establish VAR as a more efficient and scalable model for image generation than models like DiT.
items.zh: 与流行的扩散Transformer比较。VAR模型在多个维度上超越了近期流行的扩散模型扩散Transformer（DiT），后者是最新Stable-Diffusion 3 [18]和SORA [8]的前身：1）在图像生成多样性和质量（FID和IS）方面，具有2B参数的VAR模型始终优于DiT-XL/2 [46]、L-DiT-3B和L-DiT-7B [2]。VAR还保持了相当的精度和召回率。2）在推理速度上，DiT-XL/2所需的挂钟时间是VAR的45倍，而3B和7B模型 [2] 的成本更高。3）VAR被认为更具数据效率，因为它仅需350个训练轮次，而DiT-XL/2需要1400个。4）在可扩展性方面，图3和表1显示，DiT在超过675M参数后仅获得边际甚至负增益。相比之下，VAR的FID和IS持续改善，与第4.2节中的缩放定律研究一致。这些结果确立了VAR作为比DiT等模型更高效、更可扩展的图像生成模型。

items.en: These observed scaling laws [30, 22, 27, 1] not only validate the scalability of LLMs but also serve as a predictive tool for AR modeling, which facilitates the estimation of performance for larger AR models based on their smaller counterparts, thereby saving resource usage by large model performance forecasting. Given these appealing properties of scaling laws brought by LLMs, their replication in computer vision is therefore of significant interest.
items.zh: 这些观察到的缩放定律 [30, 22, 27, 1] 不仅验证了LLM的可扩展性，而且作为AR建模的预测工具，有助于根据较小的AR模型估计较大AR模型的性能，从而通过大型模型性能预测节省资源使用。鉴于LLM带来的缩放定律的这些吸引人的特性，在计算机视觉中复制它们因此具有重大意义。

items.en: Setup of scaling VAR models. Following the protocols from [30, 22, 27, 1], we examine whether our VAR model complies with similar scaling laws. We trained models across 12 different sizes, from 18M to 2B parameters, on the ImageNet training set [14] containing 1.28M images (or 870B image tokens under our VQVAE) per epoch. For models of different sizes, training spanned 200 to 350 epochs, with a maximum number of tokens reaching 305 billion. Below we focus on the scaling laws with model parameters N𝑁N and optimal training compute Cminsubscript𝐶minC_{\text{min}} given sufficient token count T𝑇T.
items.zh: 缩放VAR模型的设置。遵循 [30, 22, 27, 1] 的协议，我们检查VAR模型是否符合类似的缩放定律。我们训练了12种不同大小的模型，参数从18M到2B，在ImageNet训练集 [14] 上进行，该训练集每轮包含128万张图像（在我们的VQVAE下为870B图像令牌）。对于不同大小的模型，训练跨越200到350个轮次，最大令牌数达到3050亿。下面我们关注在给定足够令牌数T的情况下，模型参数N和最优训练算力C_min的缩放定律。

items.en: Scaling laws with model parameters N𝑁N. We first investigate the test loss trend as the VAR model size increases. The number of parameters N​(d)=73728​d3𝑁𝑑73728superscript𝑑3N(d)=73728\,d^{3} for a VAR transformer with depth d𝑑d is specified in (8). We varied d𝑑d from 666 to 303030, yielding 12 models with 18.5M to 2.0B parameters. We assessed the final test cross-entropy loss L𝐿L and token prediction error rates E​r​r𝐸𝑟𝑟Err on the ImageNet validation set of 50,000 images [14]. We computed L𝐿L and E​r​r𝐸𝑟𝑟Err for both the last scale (at the last next-scale autoregressive step), as well as the global average. The results are plotted in Fig. 5, where we observed a clear power-law scaling trend for L𝐿L as a function of N𝑁N, as consistent with [30, 22, 27, 1]. The power-law scaling laws can be expressed as:

items.en: These results verify the strong scalability of VAR, by which scaling up VAR transformers can continuously improve the model’s test performance.
items.zh: 这些结果验证了VAR的强可扩展性，通过扩展VAR Transformer可以持续改善模型的测试性能。

For each of the 12 models, we traced the test loss L𝐿L and token error rate E​r​r𝐸𝑟𝑟Err as a function of C𝐶C during training quoted in PFlops (1015superscript101510^{15} floating-point operations per second). The results are plotted in Fig. 6. items.en: These relations (13, 14) hold across 6 orders of magnitude in Cminsubscript𝐶minC_{\text{min}}, and our findings are consistent with those in [30, 22]: when trained with sufficient data, larger VAR transformers are more compute-efficient because they can reach the same level of performance with less computation.

items.en: Visualizations. To better understand how VAR models are learning when scaled up, we compare some generated 256×256256256256\times 256 samples from VAR models of 4 different sizes (depth 6, 16, 26, 30) and 3 different training stages (20%, 60%, 100% of total training tokens) in Fig. 7. To keep the content consistent, a same random seed and teacher-forced initial tokens are used. The observed improvements in visual fidelity and soundness are consistent with the scaling laws, as larger transformers are thought able to learn more complex and fine-grained image distributions.
items.zh: 可视化。为了更好地理解VAR模型在扩展时如何学习，我们在图7中比较了来自4种不同大小（深度6、16、26、30）和3个不同训练阶段（总训练令牌的20%、60%、100%）的VAR模型生成的一些256×256样本。为了保持内容一致，使用了相同的随机种子和教师强制初始令牌。观察到的视觉保真度和合理性的改善与缩放定律一致，因为更大的Transformer被认为能够学习更复杂和细粒度的图像分布。

Samples are drawn from VAR models of 4 different sizes and 3 different training stages. 9 class labels (from left to right, top to bottom) are: flamingo 130, arctic wolf 270, macaw 88, Siamese cat 284, oscilloscope 688, husky 250, mollymawk 146, volcano 980, and catamaran 484.

items.en: Image in-painting and out-painting. VAR-d𝑑d30 is tested. For in- and out-painting, we teacher-force ground truth tokens outside the mask and let the model only generate tokens within the mask. No class label information is injected into the model. The results are visualized in Fig. 8. Without modifications to the network architecture or tuning parameters, VAR has achieved decent results on these downstream tasks, substantiating the generalization ability of VAR.
items.zh: 图像修补与扩展。测试了VAR-d30。对于修补和扩展，我们在掩码外部教师强制使用真实标记，并让模型仅生成掩码内的标记。没有向模型注入类别标签信息。结果可视化在图8中。无需修改网络架构或调整参数，VAR在这些下游任务上取得了不错的结果，证实了VAR的泛化能力。

items.en: Class-conditional image editing. Following MaskGIT [11] we also tested VAR on the class-conditional image editing task. Similar to the case of in-painting, the model is forced to generate tokens only in the bounding box conditional on some class label. Fig. 8 shows the model can produce plausible content that fuses well into the surrounding contexts, again verifying the generality of VAR.
items.zh: 类别条件图像编辑。遵循MaskGIT [11]，我们还在类别条件图像编辑任务上测试了VAR。与修补情况类似，模型被迫仅在边界框内生成标记，条件为某个类别标签。图8显示模型可以生成合理的内容，与周围环境良好融合，再次验证了VAR的通用性。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Zero-shot evaluation in downstream tasks containing in-painting, out-painting, and class-conditional editing. The results show that VAR can generalize to novel downstream tasks without special design and finetuning. Zoom in for a better view.
items.capZh: 图8：在下游任务（包括修补、扩展和类别条件编辑）中的零样本评估。结果表明，VAR无需特殊设计和微调即可泛化到新的下游任务。请放大查看。

items.en: In this study, we aim to verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed VAR framework. Results are reported in Tab. 3.
items.zh: 在本研究中，我们旨在验证所提出的VAR框架的有效性和效率。结果报告在表3中。

items.en: Effectiveness and efficiency of VAR. Starting from the vanilla AR transformer baseline implemented by [11], we replace its methodology with our VAR and keep other settings unchanged to get row 2. VAR achieves a way more better FID (18.65 vs. 5.22) with only 0.013×\times inference wall-clock cost than the AR model, which demonstrates a leap in visual AR model’s performance and efficiency.
items.zh: VAR的有效性和效率。从[11]实现的普通AR Transformer基线开始，我们将其方法替换为我们的VAR，并保持其他设置不变，得到第2行。VAR实现了更好的FID（18.65 vs. 5.22），推理时间仅为AR模型的0.013倍，这展示了视觉AR模型性能和效率的飞跃。

items.en: Component-wise ablation. We further test some key components in VAR. By replacing the standard Layer Normalization (LN) with Adaptive Layer Normalization (AdaLN), VAR starts yielding better FID than baseline. By using the top-k𝑘k sampling similar to the baseline, VAR’s FID is further improved. By using the classifier-free guidance (CFG) with ratio 2.02.02.0, we reach the FID of 3.60, which is 15.05 lower to the baseline, and its inference is still 45 times faster. Due to the observed effectiveness, we equip our final VAR models with AdaLN, top-k𝑘k sampling, and classifier-free guidance. We finally scale up VAR size to 2.0B and achieve an FID of 1.80. This is 16.85 better than the baseline FID.
items.zh: 组件消融。我们进一步测试了VAR中的一些关键组件。通过将标准层归一化（LN）替换为自适应层归一化（AdaLN），VAR开始产生比基线更好的FID。通过使用与基线类似的top-k采样，VAR的FID进一步改善。通过使用比率为2.0的无分类器引导（CFG），我们达到了3.60的FID，比基线低15.05，且推理速度仍快45倍。由于观察到有效性，我们为最终的VAR模型配备了AdaLN、top-k采样和无分类器引导。我们最终将VAR规模扩展到2.0B，并实现了1.80的FID。这比基线FID好16.85。

items.en: In this work, we mainly focus on the design of learning paradigm and keep the VQVAE architecture and training unchanged from the baseline [19] to better justify VAR framework’s effectiveness. We expect advancing VQVAE tokenizer [77, 43, 74] as another promising way to enhance autoregressive generative models, which is orthogonal to our work. We believe iterating VAR by advanced tokenizer or sampling techniques in these latest work can further improve VAR’s performance or speed.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们主要关注学习范式的设计，并保持VQVAE架构和训练与基线[19]不变，以更好地证明VAR框架的有效性。我们期望改进VQVAE分词器[77, 43, 74]作为增强自回归生成模型的另一种有前景的方式，这与我们的工作正交。我们相信，通过在这些最新工作中使用先进的分词器或采样技术迭代VAR，可以进一步提高VAR的性能或速度。

items.en: Text-prompt generation is an ongoing direction of our research. Given that our model is fundamentally similar to modern LLMs, it can easily be integrated with them to perform text-to-image generation through either an encoder-decoder or in-context manner. This is currently in our high priority for exploration.
items.zh: 文本提示生成是我们正在进行的研究方向。鉴于我们的模型与现代LLM基本相似，它可以轻松地通过编码器-解码器或上下文方式与它们集成，以执行文本到图像的生成。这是我们目前优先探索的方向。

items.en: Video generation is not implemented in this work, but it can be naturally extended. By considering multi-scale video features as 3D pyramids, we can formulate a similar “3D next-scale prediction” to generate videos via VAR. Compared to diffusion-based generators like SORA [8], our method has inherent advantages in temporal consistency or integration with LLMs, thus can potentially handle longer temporal dependencies. This makes VAR competitive in the video generation field, because traditional AR models can be too inefficient for video generation due to their extremely high computational complexity and slow inference speed: it is becoming prohibitively expensive to generate high-resolution videos with traditional AR models, while VAR is capable to solve this. We therefore foresee a promising future for exploiting VAR models in the realm of video generation.
items.zh: 视频生成未在本工作中实现，但可以自然扩展。通过将多尺度视频特征视为3D金字塔，我们可以制定类似的“3D下一尺度预测”来通过VAR生成视频。与基于扩散的生成器（如SORA [8]）相比，我们的方法在时间一致性或与LLM集成方面具有固有优势，因此可以潜在地处理更长的时间依赖关系。这使得VAR在视频生成领域具有竞争力，因为传统的AR模型由于极高的计算复杂度和缓慢的推理速度，对于视频生成来说效率太低：使用传统AR模型生成高分辨率视频变得过于昂贵，而VAR能够解决这个问题。因此，我们预见到VAR模型在视频生成领域的应用前景广阔。

items.en: We introduced a new visual generative framework named Visual AutoRegressive modeling (VAR) that 1) theoretically addresses some issues inherent in standard image autoregressive (AR) models, and 2) makes language-model-based AR models first surpass strong diffusion models in terms of image quality, diversity, data efficiency, and inference speed. Upon scaling VAR to 2 billion parameters, we observed a clear power-law relationship between test performance and model parameters or training compute, with Pearson coefficients nearing −0.9980.998-0.998, indicating a robust framework for performance prediction. These scaling laws and the possibility for zero-shot task generalization, as hallmarks of LLMs, have now been initially verified in our VAR transformer models. We hope our findings and open sources can facilitate a more seamless integration of the substantial successes from the natural language processing domain into computer vision, ultimately contributing to the advancement of powerful multi-modal intelligence.
items.zh: 我们引入了一种新的视觉生成框架，称为视觉自回归建模（VAR），它1）从理论上解决了标准图像自回归（AR）模型固有的一些问题，2）使基于语言模型的AR模型在图像质量、多样性、数据效率和推理速度方面首次超越强大的扩散模型。将VAR扩展到20亿参数后，我们观察到测试性能与模型参数或训练算力之间存在清晰的幂律关系，皮尔逊系数接近-0.998，表明这是一个稳健的性能预测框架。这些缩放定律以及零样本任务泛化的可能性，作为LLM的标志，现已在我们VAR Transformer模型中初步验证。我们希望我们的发现和开源能够促进自然语言处理领域的重大成功更无缝地集成到计算机视觉中，最终推动强大的多模态智能的发展。

full.sec: Appendix A Token dependency in VQVAE
full.secZh: 附录A VQVAE中的词元依赖

items.en: To examine the token dependency in VQVAE [19], we check the attention scores in the self-attention layer before the vector quantization module. We randomly sample 4 256×\times256 images from the ImageNet validation set for this analysis. Note the self-attention layer in [19] only has 1 head so for each image we just plot one attention map. The heat map in Fig. 9 shows the attention scores of each token to all other tokens, which indicate a strong, bidirectional dependency among all tokens. This is not surprising since the VQVAE model, trained to reconstruct images, leverages self-attention layers without any attention mask. Some work [67] has used causal attention in self-attention layers of a video VAE, but we did not find any image VAE work uses causal self-attention.
items.zh: 为了检查VQVAE [19]中的标记依赖性，我们检查了向量量化模块之前自注意力层中的注意力分数。我们随机从ImageNet验证集中采样4张256×256图像进行分析。注意[19]中的自注意力层只有1个头，因此对于每张图像我们只绘制一个注意力图。图9中的热图显示了每个标记对所有其他标记的注意力分数，这表明所有标记之间存在强烈的双向依赖性。这并不奇怪，因为VQVAE模型训练用于重建图像，使用没有注意力掩码的自注意力层。一些工作[67]在视频VAE的自注意力层中使用了因果注意力，但我们没有发现任何图像VAE工作使用因果自注意力。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Token dependency plotted. The normalized heat map of attention scores in the last self-attention layer of VQGAN encoder is visualized. 4 random 256×\times256 images from ImageNet validation set are used.
items.capZh: 图9：标记依赖性图。显示了VQGAN编码器最后一个自注意力层中注意力分数的归一化热图。使用了来自ImageNet验证集的4张随机256×256图像。
